lineage.Process: CreateFishnet E:\ArcGIS_files\Projects\030926_inundation_prob\030926_inundation_prob.gdb\slc_fishnet "407061.195441707 4505805.58866799" "407061.195441707 4505815.58866799" 500 500 # # "437672.497301747 4523038.12154016" NO_LABELS "407061.195441707 4505805.58866799 437672.497301747 4523038.12154016 PROJCS["NAD_1983_UTM_Zone_12N",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-111.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]]" POLYGON

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>grid_id</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet grid_id !OID! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id dem_zs_slc grid_id MEAN NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DEMMEAN</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet DEMMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField slc_fishnet MEAN DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id slope_zs_slc grid_id MEAN;AREA NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>SLOPEMEAN</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>SLOPEAREA</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet SLOPEMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField slc_fishnet SLOPEAREA !AREA! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField slc_fishnet MEAN DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField slc_fishnet AREA DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id fac_zs_slc grid_id SUM NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>FACSUM</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet FACSUM !SUM! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField slc_fishnet SUM DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id imp_zs_slc grid_id PCT NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
DeleteField slc_fishnet SLOPEAREA DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id dist_hydro_zs_slc grid_id MEAN NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DISTMEAN</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet DISTMEAN !MEAN! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField slc_fishnet MEAN DELETE_FIELDS
JoinField slc_fishnet grid_id dem_zs_slc grid_id AREA NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>slc_fishnet</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>DEMAREA</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField slc_fishnet DEMAREA !AREA! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField slc_fishnet AREA DELETE_FIELDS

ExportTable slc_fishnet "C:\Users\Gab\OneDrive\Documents\SPRING 2026\CPLN6750_Land Use and Environmental Modeling\flood_inundation_probability\SLC.csv" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,Shape_Area,-1,-1;grid_id "grid_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,grid_id,-1,-1;DEMMEAN "DEMMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,DEMMEAN,-1,-1;SLOPEMEAN "SLOPEMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,SLOPEMEAN,-1,-1;FACSUM "FACSUM" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,FACSUM,-1,-1;PCT "PCT" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,PCT,-1,-1;DISTMEAN "DISTMEAN" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,DISTMEAN,-1,-1;DEMAREA "DEMAREA" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,slc_fishnet,DEMAREA,-1,-1" #

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
